pr.title: Non-record:11L GQA + MLP 3 + Partial RoPE + Int6 Attn/MLP + QAT40

output.summary: 11-layer GPT-style model pairs GQA/Partial RoPE with late-stage QAT and mixed Int6 quantization to fit within 16MB while keeping capacity high.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training includes full-data muon+AdamW runs with no explicit val-only training regime.
techniques: GQA attention with Partial RoPE and expanded MLP
Late QAT40 plus LR warmdown for durability
Int6 mixed quantization for MLP/attention projections
